entries.slideRef: Measured Context Savings With Sufficiency Checks
entries.claimExcerpt: On the current 10-repo / 20-case benchmark across major repositories, Save-The-Token cuts successful sufficient contexts by **69.3% weighted average** and **63.5% median**. Source: [docs/benchmark.md](docs/benchmark.md).
| `69.3%` weighted saving on successful cases | Evidence-routing and compression result, without counting insufficient contexts as wins. Source: [docs/benchmark.md](docs/benchmark.md). |
